summary: Couples journaling app with vision board feature. User requested removal of goal limit in vision board section.
known_issues: Vision board section has a hard-coded cap on the number of goals a user can add

existing_features.title: Remove any hard-coded maximum cap on the number of goals a user can add in the Vision Board section, allowing unlimited goals to be created.

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove goal limit in vision board section to allow unlimited goals
If the backend Motoko actor enforces a maximum number of vision board goals per user, remove or eliminate that cap so the backend accepts and stores an unlimited number of goals.
